overall.description: First-person exploration through a gothic-style infirmary hall with hospital beds and tall arched windows, followed by interaction with an NPC near a medicine cabinet, then transitioning to a dimly lit portrait gallery corridor. High-quality game engine footage with detailed environmental storytelling.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks through a spacious gothic infirmary hall illuminated by tall arched windows. Hospital beds with teal privacy screens line both sides of the marble floor. A healer in period clothing crosses the hall from right to left, and an ornate chandelier hangs from the vaulted ceiling above.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to focus on a wooden medicine cabinet filled with bottles and jars. An antique wheelchair stands nearby. A healer approaches and gestures while standing near the cabinet, engaging in some activity. The area is more shadowed compared to the main hall.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow corridor with dark green walls completely covered in framed portraits. Warm light from ornate wall lanterns illuminates the gallery. The camera walks forward through this enclosed space, passing rows of paintings in elaborate gold frames, with a decorated wooden ceiling visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, spacious gothic infirmary into a dimly lit, intimate portrait gallery. It begins by gliding through a grand hall of marble floors and vaulted ceilings, passing hospital beds with teal privacy screens as a healer crosses the path beneath an ornate chandelier. As the camera turns right, the open light of the arched windows gives way to the deeper shadows of a medicine cabinet area, where another healer gestures beside an antique wheelchair. The scene then shifts from the wide hall into a narrow, enclosed corridor with dark green walls and a decorated wooden ceiling. Finally, the camera moves forward through this gallery, passing rows of gold-framed portraits illuminated by the warm glow of ornate wall lanterns.
